title: VCK, IUML extend unconditional support to Vijay’s TVK; alliance with DMK intact, says Thirumavalavan
description: VCK chief Thol. Thirumavalavan said, “Our alliance within the DMK-led Secular Progressive Alliance will continue. As a political party, we have taken this decision by exercising our independent right. This will not affect our relationship with the DMK.”
